title: ws.rs: GROUP_LIST rate-limit checked before subscription gate — same ordering bug fixed for SEALED_WHISPER in round 58
description: relay/src/ws.rs GROUP_LIST handler (line 1890): check_rate_limit is called before the require_subscription gate (line 1904). An unsubscribed client that repeatedly calls GROUP_LIST burns its rate-limit budget on requests that will always be rejected by the subscription check. The correct order — subscription check first, rate-limit second — was just established for SEALED_WHISPER in round 58 (commit 21504e4). GROUP_LIST was missed. Fix: move check_rate_limit block to after the subscribed_flag check, matching the pattern in BROADCAST, WHISPER, GROUP_ADD, GROUP_CREATE, and SEALED_WHISPER.
